title: Khipro Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khipro, with a Z-Score of +3.66. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Khipro has resulted in a score of 10.0 out of 10, indicating severe conditions. 
 The temperature has led to a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.8 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 58% and the wind speed is 13.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
